exceptions.justification: Superseded by get_accounts_summary to keep tool output normalized and stable.
Bulk logout is a high-blast-radius mass action and intentionally not tool-exposed.
Bulk relogin can trigger account lock/challenge waves and remains operator-only.
2FA completion requires interactive challenge handling not suitable for autonomous tool calls.
Lookup helper only; not a standalone operator tool capability.
Internal post-auth hydration step, not intended as externally invocable operation.
Raw credential login is intentionally excluded from LLM-callable tools.
Maintenance/refresh routine managed by workflows, not by direct operator tool calls.
Account-id variant is intentionally hidden; username-scoped relogin tool is exposed.
Bulk proxy mutation has high blast radius and is intentionally not exposed.
Low-level constructor API; tool layer exposes validated scheduling entrypoints instead.
Draft-primitive API is intentionally hidden behind username-based scheduling wrapper.
Job deletion is intentionally UI/operator-controlled and not exposed to autonomous tooling.
Legacy list endpoint; list_recent_posts is the supported tool-facing read surface.
Retry semantics are intentionally controlled by explicit UI/operator workflows.
Parsing helper utility, not a first-class capability for graph planning.
Story publishing has high payload complexity and side-effect risk; intentionally withheld.
Parsing helper utility, intentionally not exposed as a standalone tool.
Low-level pagination primitive; list_comments provides the stable tool-facing surface.
Numeric participant-id variant is intentionally replaced by username-based tool API.
Numeric user-id bulk message path is intentionally not exposed; username send path is used.
Mass-follow action is intentionally not exposed due abuse/rate-limit risk.
Mass-unfollow action is intentionally not exposed due abuse/rate-limit risk.
